description_long: This fence is constructed from rough-hewn wooden logs, featuring two thick horizontal rails attached to two vertical posts. The wood displays a natural, unpolished texture with visible grain and irregularities, giving it a rustic and sturdy appearance. The rails are uneven and slightly curved, emphasizing the handcrafted look. Metal fasteners are visible at the joints where the rails meet the posts, providing structural support. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for marking boundaries in parks, gardens, or rural urban edges. The top edges of the posts are flat and unadorned, and there are no decorative elements present.
description: A rustic wooden fence with two horizontal rails and two sturdy vertical posts, joined by visible metal fasteners. The wood is rough and natural, with a handcrafted, utilitarian appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing both vertical posts and the full length of the two horizontal rails, with visible wood grain and metal fasteners.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness of the posts and rails, with the rails protruding outward and the fasteners more prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the opposite faces of the posts and rails, with the same rough wood texture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, highlighting the depth and irregularity of the rails and the cylindrical shape of the posts.
